motion_system: near-still archival pressure: only faint lineage scratches, scan drift, and pinhole shimmer imply movement
color_drift: deep charcoal and bruised tape-blue drifting into smoky violet-gray, interrupted by restrained yellow, cyan, off-white, and silver accents
glow_behavior: small glints gather on plastic seams, node pinholes, and worn stamp edges; no theatrical spotlight
